text: The pricing page makes no sense. Three tiers, but the feature comparison table contradicts what the sales rep told me.
way too expensive for what it does. we pay $400/mo and half the features are locked behind the next tier
I got charged for overages I didn't know existed. Nowhere during onboarding was I told events above 100k are billed separately.
Pricing is opaque. I literally cannot figure out what my bill will be next month.
The jump from Starter to Pro is brutal. 5x the price for one feature we need (SSO). Please add an in-between plan.
honestly the product is fine but the billing surprises are killing us. finance flags it every quarter
Why is annual billing the only way to get a discount? We're a seasonal business, monthly flexibility matters.
Your competitor charges half for the same feature set. We're staying for now because migration is painful, not because the price is fair.
the per-seat model punishes us for inviting stakeholders who look at one dashboard a month
Costs doubled after the plan restructure last year and we got a two week notice. Not ok.
I need a cost estimator or calculator. Guessing my usage tier every month is stressful.
Cheap to start, expensive to scale. Classic bait. The 10k events free tier ran out in 3 days.
Dashboards take 30+ seconds to load every morning. My standup is me staring at a spinner.
the app has gotten noticeably slower over the past few months, especially the main dashboard
Query timeouts every time I filter by more than two dimensions. Have to refresh and pray.
Loading a 90-day view takes forever. 60-day works. Something about the date range chokes it.
SLOW. SLOW. SLOW. That's my feedback.
Performance on large workspaces is unusable. We have 40 dashboards and switching between them takes ~15s each.
charts render one by one like a slideshow from 2005. please batch the queries or something
The spinner is my most-viewed screen in your product.
Since the March update everything feels laggy, even typing in the search box stutters.
Weekly report generation used to take 2 minutes, now it's 20. Nothing changed on our side.
It's fast at 9am and unusable at 2pm. Feels like you're under-provisioned for US afternoon traffic.
opening the events explorer freezes my browser tab for a solid ten seconds
Slowness aside the product is good. But the slowness is really testing my patience.
CSV export silently drops rows past 10k. Took us a month to notice our reports were wrong. This is a data integrity issue!
exported csv has dates in three different formats depending on the column. excel chokes on it
The export button just... does nothing sometimes? No error, no file, nothing.
Export to CSV loses all the filters I applied. I get the full dataset instead of my segment.
Why can't I schedule a recurring CSV export? I do the same manual export every Monday.
csv exports use semicolons for eu accounts and commas for us. our data pipeline broke twice because of this
Special characters in the export are mangled. Every name with an accent comes out as mojibake.
The export limit of 50MB is arbitrary and undocumented. Found out from support after an hour of debugging.
I asked for exports with column headers matching the UI labels. Got internal field names like usr_evt_cnt_7d instead.
Exports time out on anything bigger than a week of data. So much for the yearly review.
please just let me export the underlying data of ANY chart. some charts have no export button at all
Support is genuinely the best I've experienced in SaaS. Answered in 20 minutes with an actual solution.
shoutout to Marta from support who debugged our webhook issue on a friday evening
The support team knows the product deeply. No script-reading, no 'have you tried turning it off'.
Every ticket gets a thoughtful reply within the hour. How do you do it?
support turned a churn-worthy bug into a reason to stay. they escalated, fixed and followed up a week later
Your support chat is better than most companies' paid consulting.
I've never waited more than 30 min for a real human answer. Keep it up.
The migration assistance from your team was hands-on and free. Unexpected and appreciated.
docs are meh but support fills the gap every single time
Support even wrote us a custom script to backfill our data. Above and beyond.
Fast, kind, competent support. Rare combo.
No mobile app in 2026 is honestly baffling. I check metrics on the go daily.
please please please make an iphone app. the mobile web version is unusable on a small screen
I need push alerts on my phone when a metric crosses a threshold. Email alerts get buried.
Our execs want to glance at dashboards from their phones. Currently they screenshot-ask me instead.
the charts don't even render on mobile safari, just empty boxes
An Android app would make this a 10/10 product for me.
Checking a number on my phone requires pinch-zooming through a desktop layout. Painful.
Every competitor has a mobile app. This is the only reason we're evaluating alternatives.
mobile support please!! even a read-only app would be enough
On-call engineers need dashboards on their phone at 3am. Mobile web login with 2FA on a small screen is torture.
I'd settle for responsive design, not even asking for a native app at this point.
The login emails take 10+ minutes to arrive. By then the code has expired. Infuriating.
signup flow asked me 12 questions before showing me the product. i almost bailed
The magic link opens in my email app's browser where I'm not logged in. Endless loop.
Onboarding tutorial references UI elements that don't exist anymore. Clearly outdated.
took me three days to get the tracking snippet working. the setup docs skip the SPA case entirely
Inviting a teammate is buried four menus deep. Should be one click from anywhere.
First-run experience dumps you on an empty dashboard with no guidance. Blank page paralysis.
the verification email went to spam for our entire team. gmail workspace, nothing exotic
Setting up the data source required contacting support. That should be self-serve.
I get logged out every day and the login mail dance starts again. Session length is way too short.
New team members consistently get stuck at the workspace-join step. We wrote an internal wiki page just for it.
Great product overall but the dashboard is slow AND the pricing tiers make no sense together. Fix either and I'm happy.
Support helped me work around the broken CSV export in minutes. Great people, broken feature.
If I could see dashboards on my phone I wouldn't care that they load slowly on desktop.
Billing surprises plus a signup flow from hell almost made us churn in week one.
The exports are broken half the time and when I ping support they fix it within the hour. Sisyphus as a service.
Slow dashboards, no mobile app. My commute is wasted time I could spend reviewing metrics.
love it
n/a
everything is fine i guess
The weather in Lisbon was great during your user conference. Nice coffee too.
asdfgh test test please ignore
I use the product every day.
Mon tableau de bord met plus de trente secondes à s'afficher chaque matin, c'est vraiment pénible.
El precio subió sin aviso y nadie nos explicó por qué. Muy decepcionante.
Die CSV-Exporte sind seit Wochen kaputt, die Umlaute werden alle zerstört.
10/10 would recommend
why did you remove the dark theme??? bring it back
The API rate limits are documented as 100 req/s but we get throttled at 40.
your sales guy keeps emailing me even after i asked him to stop. three times this week
Would love a Notion integration someday.
SLOW. SLOW. SLOW. That's my feedback.
love it
I have a dream that one day my dashboards will load before my coffee gets cold.
The onboarding was so 'smooth' that I only needed four support tickets to see my first chart.
no comment
It does what it says on the tin. Charts appear, numbers are numbers.
Stop moving the export button around every release. Muscle memory is a thing.
We built our whole monday ritual around your weekly digest email. Don't ever remove it.
Honnêtement le support est incroyable, réponse en dix minutes un dimanche soir.
make it faster and cheaper thanks bye
